title: podman pull null-pointer dereference (_CONTAINERS_USERNS_CONFIGURED=1)
body:
/kind bug

**Description**

podman crashes with a null-pointer dereference if `_CONTAINERS_USERNS_CONFIGURED=1`. The container I'm running this in is `quay.io/podman/stable:latest` and a root-less container.

**Steps to reproduce the issue:**

1. `podman run -it --rm --device=/dev/fuse quay.io/podman/stable bash`
2. `_CONTAINERS_USERNS_CONFIGURED=1 podman --log-level debug run -it --rm alpine id`

**Describe the results you received:**

<details>

```
[root@91d2318141a3 /]# podman --version
podman version 4.3.1
[root@91d2318141a3 /]# _CONTAINERS_USERNS_CONFIGURED=1 podman --log-level debug run -it --rm alpine id

DEBU[0000] Merged system config "/etc/containers/containers.conf"
```

No

comments.body:
Thanks for reaching out.

I don´t think it's safe to manually set  _CONTAINERS_USERNS_CONFIGURED. @giuseppe PTAL
Yes, it is used internally by Podman when it creates the rootless user namespace, it is not supposed to be used directly
